title: ToroHealth-Continued
description: A client-side health indicator mod providing clear, configurable visual feedback for entity health changes.
body:
![zombie Nautilus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f2ee6a2d78b05b926ea69ddb68d034da9bdee93_0.webp)This mod is a client-side fork and refinement of ToroHealth, redesigned to provide clearer, more reliable, and more informative visual feedback for entity health changes.

It offers three complementary health indicators:

* HUD Indicator – A configurable top-left HUD display showing an entity’s health bar along with multiple health-related details for precise, at-a-glance information.

* Health Change Particles – Lightweight particle effects that visually represent damage and healing events in real time.

* In-World Health Bars – Health bars rendered above entities in the world, allowing players to monitor enemy and ally health without shifting focus away from gameplay.

**In World Bars** are turned off by default, enable it by setting inWorldBarVisibilityMode to WHEN_HOLDING_WEAPON or ALWAYS if you want this function

Compared to the original ToroHealth, this fork focuses on refined visuals, improved rendering performance, reduced bugs, and cleaner internal architecture, resulting in smoother gameplay and better compatibility with modern Minecraft versions.

The mod is fully client-side, requires no server installation![Mod demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90ede1cb792e47e9adf947a722e7c1dad22938e2.jpeg)
